entries.summary_quote: The tentative finding of the California Department of Transportation is as follows: 1. The proposed project is consistent with the State Implementation Plan since it reduces emissions. 2. The alternatives would result in greater emissions of hydrocarbons. This would be inconsistent with the oxidant control strategy of the State Implementation Plan.

entries.summary_quote: Another motion was passed, "to oppose Route 252 for the following reasons: "1. Route 252 will further serve to divide the community. "2. The additional cost to construct will be prohibitive. "6. The Development Committee gave its approval at a time when much attention was directed toward Route 157."

entries.entity: City of San Diego Environmental Quality Department
entries.summary_quote: Highway 252 may not be the most effective means of serving the long-term transportation needs of the region. Based upon data presented in the draft EIS, it appears to be intended to prevent additional freeway congestion rather than relieve current traffic problems. The final EIS could more fully evaluate all alternatives which might similarly or better accomplish the project objectives.

mentions.quote: Highway 252 may not be the most effective means of serving the long-term transportation needs of the region. Based upon data presented in the draft EIS, it appears to be intended to prevent additional freeway congestion rather than relieve current traffic problems. The final EIS could more fully evaluate all alternatives which might similarly or better accomplish the project objectives.
mentions.stance_basis: Supports project only if EIS is substantially revised to address alternatives, impacts on open space, community cohesion, noise, air quality, and visual impacts
